ddls:
CREATE TABLE "songs" (
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each song */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the song */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artist who created the song */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the album the song belongs to */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genre of the song */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the song */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the song was released */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the song */,
  "explicit_content" INTEGER /* Indicates if the song contains explicit content */,
  "external_id" TEXT /* External ID for linking to platforms like Spotify or Apple Music */,
  "track_number" INTEGER /* Track number of the song in the album */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the artist */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the artist */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the artist's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the album */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artist who created the album */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the album was released */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genre of the album */,
  "cover_art_url" TEXT /* URL of the album cover art */,
  "total_tracks" INTEGER /* Total number of tracks in the album */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the playlist */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  "privacy_setting" TEXT /* Privacy setting of the playlist (public, private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_entries" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist entry */,
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the playlist the entry belongs to */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the song in the playlist */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date the song was added to the playlist */,
  "play_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the song has been played in the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_entries_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_entries_playlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("playlist_id") REFERENCES playlists ("playlist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, moderator, user) */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "preferred_genre" TEXT /* Preferred genre of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who gave the rating */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the song being rated */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "rated_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment given by the user along with the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "listening_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each listening history entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who listened to the song */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the song listened to */,
  "listen_date" TEXT /* Date the song was listened to */,
  "play_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the user has listened to the song */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listening_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listening_history_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "song_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each song feature */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the song the feature belongs to */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature (e.g., energy, danceability) */,
  "feature_value" REAL /* Value of the feature (e.g., 0.5, 0.8) */,
  "feature_type" TEXT /* Type of the feature (e.g., acoustic, instrumental) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_song_features_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user the recommendation was given to */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the song recommended */,
  "recommended_date" TEXT /* Date the recommendation was given */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborative_filtering" (
  "cf_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaborative filtering entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user the entry belongs to */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the song the entry belongs to */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user to the song */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cf_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborative_filtering_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborative_filtering_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
